logFile.title: Homebridge Log File
logFile.description: Absolute path to the Homebridge log file. If omitted, the plugin uses homebridge.log in the Homebridge storage directory.

errorThreshold.title: Anomaly Threshold
errorThreshold.description: Number of counted anomalies inside the analysis window required to trigger the Leak Sensor.

analysisWindowSeconds.title: Analysis Window
analysisWindowSeconds.description: Rolling time window, in seconds, used to count anomalies.

resetAfterSeconds.title: Automatic Reset Delay
resetAfterSeconds.description: Number of seconds without a new anomaly before the Leak Sensor returns to normal.

monitorWarnings.title: Monitor WARN Lines
monitorWarnings.description: When enabled, WARN lines count as anomalies together with ERROR lines.

scanIntervalSeconds.title: Scan Interval
scanIntervalSeconds.description: How often the plugin reads new lines appended to the log file.
